tables.name: sheet_budget
tables.label: Budget
tables.description: A spreadsheet. Edit any cell; type =formulas (=B1*C1, =SUM(D1:D3)); drag to select a block; ⌘C/⌘V copy-paste; ⌘D/⌘R fill a formula down/right with references that shift per cell.

tables.name: sheet_scores
tables.label: Scores
tables.description: A second sheet in the same workbook. The switcher flips between this and the Budget sheet.
